task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Redmine as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Logged in as admin' in the top right corner or the presence of the 'Administration' link in the top menu bar of the Redmine interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a new tracker named 'Permit Application'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tracker named 'Permit Application' in the Trackers list under Administration, or a success message ('Successful creation') after filling out the new tracker form with this name.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Permit Application' tracker has the correct statuses enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the tracker configuration screen. The checkboxes for 'New', 'In Progress', 'Resolved', and 'Closed' should be checked under the 'Issue statuses' section.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Wind Farm Alpha' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Wind Farm Alpha' in the project header, breadcrumbs, or the project overview page.

task_completion.description: Verify a new issue is created with the correct tracker and subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the new issue form or the created issue view. The 'Tracker' field must be set to 'Permit Application' and the 'Subject' field must be 'Wind Farm Alpha - Environmental Impact Assessment Permit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new issue has the correct priority and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the issue details. The 'Priority' dropdown must be set to 'Normal', and the 'Description' text area must contain the phrase 'regional planning authority'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window (like Firefox or Chromium) displaying the Redmine interface, rather than terminal commands (like curl) interacting with the Redmine API.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply type the expected outputs into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual Redmine web pages and forms being filled out, not a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) containing the task details.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually saved/submitted the tracker and issue.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for green success flash messages (e.g., 'Successful creation') or the final saved view of the issue/tracker, rather than just a filled-out form that was never submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Tracker Name: 'Permit Application'. Expected Statuses to be enabled: 'New', 'In Progress', 'Resolved', 'Closed'. Expected Issue Subject: 'Wind Farm Alpha - Environmental Impact Assessment Permit'. Expected Issue Priority: 'Normal'. The issue description must contain the fragment: 'regional planning authority'.
